description:
Model a property containing two distinct buildings and install solar panels on both using the Skelion plugin.

1) Main House: Create a 40'x24' building with 10' walls and a sloped gable roof (ridge 6' high). Install flush-mounted (parallel) solar panels on the South-facing roof slope.
2) Detached Garage: Create a 20'x20' building nearby with 10' walls and a flat roof. Install tilted solar panels (20-degree tilt, 180-degree azimuth) on the flat roof.

Save the completed 3D model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\mixed_mode_solar.skp'.
